description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: When the execution through the StarGuard method is used, the
Spells are whitelisted in Sky Core Spells and later executed using the StarGuard module. The Sky Core Spell includes a whitelist of approved

Spells, which allows them to be executed via separate transactions. This enhances resilience and scalability, ensuring robust handling of payloads from multiple active Agents while minimizing risks to Sky Core.
description: Do not merge unless associated poll passes
